steps.title: Set up the cascade of percentages
steps.content: Items that are green rectangular metal must satisfy all three properties sequentially: 37% of the box is green, 37% of those are rectangular, and 42% of those are metal. To find the percentage meeting all conditions, multiply: 0.37 × 0.37 × 0.42.

steps.title: Calculate the combined percentage
steps.content:
$$0.37 \times 0.37 \times 0.42 = 0.1369 \times 0.42 = 0.057498 \approx 5.75\%$$
So about 5.75% of all items are green rectangular metal.

steps.title: Find items NOT green rectangular metal
steps.content:
The question asks for the percentage that are not green rectangular metal. Subtract from 100%: $$100\% - 5.75\% = 94.25\%$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
